extracted.title: MNUS Imbalance Notice -- Update
extracted.description:
Maritimes & Northeast (M&N) has limited operational flexibility to manage imbalances. Effective 9:00 AM CCT, April 6, 2026, M&N requires all shippers and point operators to carefully review demand for gas and schedule gas consistent with daily needs and to tender and receive gas consistent with confirmed nominations regardless of their cumulative imbalance position.

Correspondingly, effective 9:00 AM CCT, April 6, 2026, the previously posted imbalance notice is no longer in effect.

Shippers are required to coordinate any imbalance payback through M&N's account representative and actual payback quantities may be limited depending on system operations and conditions.

Additionally, M&N continues to require all Power Plant Operators to provide information mandated by FERC Order No. 698 until further notice. Information required includes the hourly consumption profile of directly connected power generation facilities.

If necessary, M&N will utilize any provision of its tariff to ensure system integrity including the issuance of customer specific or system wide OFOs.

This notice will remain in effect until further notice.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
